birthday.notes: Offer cake and flowers after main gift ideas unless budget is tight. Match age-appropriate picks for kids vs adults.

anniversary.notes: Romantic but tasteful; flowers and premium hampers work well.

wedding.notes: Traditional Sri Lankan weddings may prefer elegant flowers and practical home gifts.

new_baby.notes: Gentle, practical baby-safe items; avoid strong perfumes.

get_well.notes: Comforting, not overly cheerful; fruit baskets and soft flowers are appropriate.

condolence.notes: Respectful and understated only. No cakes, balloons, or party items. White or soft condolence flowers.

thank_you.notes: Thoughtful but not extravagant unless user indicates otherwise.

congratulations.notes: Celebrate the milestone; hampers and flowers are safe defaults.

avurudu.notes: Traditional Sri Lankan New Year gifts: sweets, hampers, fruit; respect cultural tone.

vesak.notes: Respectful Buddhist occasion; avoid alcohol or inappropriate party items.

valentine.notes: Romantic flowers and chocolates; confirm recipient relationship if unclear.

mothers_day.notes: Warm appreciation gifts; flowers and pamper hampers are popular.

apology.notes: Empathy first — effort and sincerity beat price. Flowers + chocolate + a card is the classic recovery move. Never interrogate about budget before showing options.
